steps.t: Gapholt is south and west of Woodhurst, nestled on a cliff well above the Gap of Rohan. Gapholt is one of the few places still untouched by the war th…
The refugees in the line to get into Gapholt appear agitated by the long wait.
There is a guard at the head of the line leading into Gapholt. You should talk to the guard to learn why everyone is waiting to enter the town.
Thane Nothmar is near the bridge leading into Gapholt. You have been given permission to enter Gapholt and seek aid from Thane Nothmar.
Thane Nothmar is near the bridge leading into Gapholt. Thane Nothmar has asked for help preparing Gapholt's defences for a possible attack.
Thane Nothmar is near the bridge leading into Gapholt. With the defences prepared and supplies gathered for the journey, it is time to return to Thane…
